dataDisplay.title: Data Display Components
dataDisplay.story: Jokester began sneaking into the castle in the middle of the night and leaving jokes all over the place: under the king's pillow, in his soup, even in the royal toilet. The king was furious, but he couldn't seem to catch the jokester. And the worst part was, the king was starting to find the jokes funny. He fought hard to maintain a straight face, but it was getting harder and harder. The people of the kingdom noticed the king's new good mood, and they were all much happier for it.

feedback.title: Feedback Components
feedback.description: Components for user feedback and notifications
feedback.alertDescription: You can add components to your app using the cli.
